introSection: Achtbaan is a steel kiddie roller coaster located at Mondo Verde in Landgraaf, Limburg, Netherlands.

sections.title: History
sections.content: The ride opened at Liseberg in 1977 as Lilla Bergbanan. In 1986, it was rethemed to Cirkusexpressen, which was Swedish for Circus Express. After its closure in 2008, it was relocated to Mondo Verde. There, the ride was renamed Wilde Tijger Achtbaan, which was Dutch for Wild Tiger Roller Coaster. It opened on 11 April 2009. The name was eventually changed to Achtbaan, which is Dutch for Roller Coaster. The ride is listed as Treno on the park's website, but this name does not appear in the park, and is thus not used on Coasterpedia.

sections.title: Design
sections.content: Achtbaan is a Tivoli Medium coaster from Zierer.

sections.title: Colour scheme
sections.content: Red track and green supports. The ride used to feature dark green track and green supports at Mondo Verde, before recieving its current colours. Dark blue track and white supports at Liseberg

sections.title: Trains
sections.content: The train is designed to resemble an sentient engine.

fullText:
Achtbaan is a steel kiddie roller coaster located at Mondo Verde in Landgraaf, Limburg, Netherlands.

The ride opened at Liseberg in 1977 as Lilla Bergbanan. In 1986, it was rethemed to Cirkusexpressen, which was Swedish for Circus Express. After its closure in 2008, it was relocated to Mondo Verde. There, the ride was renamed Wilde Tijger Achtbaan, which was Dutch for Wild Tiger Roller Coaster. It opened on 11 April 2009. The name was eventually changed to Achtbaan, which is Dutch for Roller Coaster. The ride is listed as Treno on the park's website, but this name does not appear in the park, and is thus not used on Coasterpedia.

Achtbaan is a Tivoli Medium coaster from Zierer.

Red track and green supports. The ride used to feature dark green track and green supports at Mondo Verde, before recieving its current colours. Dark blue track and white supports at Liseberg

The train is designed to resemble an sentient engine.
